topic.title: GUEST SPEAKER ANNOUNCEMENT: Peter Emery - February 21st @12:00EST
topic.text:
Who's coming: Peter Emery - fractional CMO, solopreneur, and someone currently learning agentic AI in real-time through Harvard Data Science Review's (HDSR) Agentic AI program.

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/peterjemery/

Why you should care: Peter's career is basically a masterclass in pivoting. MTV → The Apprentice → Charles Schwab → PayPal → event marketing for Google, YouTube, BMW → now building his own consulting practice while learning AI agent strategy. He's proof that you can reinvent yourself multiple times and that "I'm learning this too" is actually a superpower.

What we're doing: Interview-style conversation about career pivots, bridging creative and technical skills, and what it's like to learn AI frameworks as a marketing/brand professional. This is directly relevant to your journey as Creative Engineers.

What I need from you:

Come prepared with questions. I've got mine, but the Q&A section is for YOU. Think about what you want to know about career transitions, learning technical skills as a creative, or applying AI to brand experiences.

Cameras ON. This is a conversation, not a webinar. Peter's giving us his time for free—show up present and engaged.

Be ready to participate. If the conversation goes in an interesting direction, I'm following it. Your insights and questions make this better for everyone.

Pro tip: Check out Peter's LinkedIn if you want background, but honestly, the "learning in the messy middle" is the most valuable part of what he brings.

See you Saturday. Show up curious.

Thanks, Prof. Nik & Nina
